videos.title: Commander Ninjutsu was a mistake.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena gameplay with a blue/black Ninja deck, ft. Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow (Yuffie Kisaragi) in Brawl. 

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

37:17 - vs Samut, Vizier of Naktamun

48:47 - vs Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow 
52:30 - vs Marchesa, Dealer of Death
